summary: Iteration 33: Tested 4 new features - (1) Category audit logs endpoint + UI, (2) QuoteRequests horizontal buttons, (3) Customers Currency column, (4) Articles pagination. All 16 backend tests pass (100%). All 4 features fully verified in frontend.

issues: Persistent console hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option>' - caused by Emergent framework VE wrapper, not application code. Non-blocking. Carried from iteration 32.

critical_code_review_comments: All 4 features implemented cleanly. No critical issues found.
Note: /api/articles/public requires authentication (get_current_user), not a public endpoint despite the name - this is existing behavior, not a new regression.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up 2 test categories (TEST_CAT_LOGS_*, TEST_CAT_UPD_*) for audit log verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 tested 4 new features. Key results: (1) GET /admin/categories/{id}/logs returns 200 with {logs:[]} array, auth required, no _id, audit logs created on category create/update/delete. (2) CategoriesTab has Logs button per row opening 'Category Audit Logs' dialog. (3) QuoteRequestsTab Edit+Logs buttons are in flex gap-1 div (side-by-side, same y coordinate). (4) CustomersTab has Currency column with data-testid=admin-customer-currency-{id} showing CAD/USD. (5) Articles /articles page: PER_PAGE=9, shows exactly 9 per page, 'Showing 1-9 of 33 articles', 'Page 1 of 4', Previous disabled on page 1, Next navigates to page 2 with different articles, category filter resets to page 1.

feature_test_results.Admin Categories tab - Logs button: PASS - 20 buttons visible, dialog opens with 'Category Audit Logs' title
feature_test_results.Admin QuoteRequests - horizontal buttons: PASS - Edit+Logs buttons at same y-coordinate (side-by-side), Edit x=1587 Logs x=1630
feature_test_results.Admin QuoteRequests - Logs dialog: PASS - 'Quote Request Audit Logs' dialog opens
feature_test_results.Admin Customers - Currency column: PASS - Currency column visible with CAD/USD/USD values, data-testid=admin-customer-currency-{id}
feature_test_results.Articles page - Next works: PASS - navigates to page 2, different 9 articles
feature_test_results.Articles page - Previous enabled on p2: PASS - disabled attribute absent on page 2
feature_test_results.Articles page - category filter resets p: PASS - clicking Blog filter resets to Page 1 of 3, Showing 1-9 of 20 articles
